name: Zombie Killer
short_description: Free to play! Crash-land solo in zombie-infested territory, farm kills to power your signal and rescue your squad. Expand with the Overkill Protocol DLC ($8.99) to unlock new global maps, vehicles and a robot companion.
detailed_description:
ABOUT THE GAME

The mission begins with hope. Multiple soldiers board a military aircraft, heading toward a critical destination. But fate has other plans.

Mid-flight, a devastating bomb explosion tears through the aircraft, sending it spiraling into a catastrophic crash. When the dust settles, our hero – a skilled soldier – finds himself alone amidst the wreckage, separated from his team in hostile, zombie-infested territory.

THE MISSION

With no contact and no backup, survival becomes the first priority. But this soldier doesn't give up. To locate his missing teammates, he must fight through waves of relentless zombies. Each kill strengthens the signal, bringing him closer to finding his brothers-in-arms.

Kill zombies → Increase signal strength → Locate teammates → Rescue and survive

Once the signal reaches full strength, the location of one teammate is revealed. Now the real challenge begins – navigate through the undead horde, reach your fallen comrade, and bring them back alive.

GAMEPLAY FEATURES

• Story-driven survival: Experience a gripping narrative of brotherhood and survival

• Signal system: Every zombie eliminated boosts your signal to locate teammates

• Intense combat: Face endless waves of zombies with strategic weapon choices

• Rescue missions: Find and save your teammates scattered across the battlefield

• Immersive 3D audio: Hear every groan and footstep – the undead are everywhere

Will you have what it takes to reunite your squad and survive the apocalypse? Lock and load, soldier. Your team is counting on you.

WANT MORE? - OVERKILL PROTOCOL DLC

The free base game gives you Zombie Island. The paid Overkill Protocol DLC ($8.99) unlocks everything below that free players are missing:

• 3 New Levels: Fight through neon-soaked Tokyo streets, foggy hill roads in northern India, and the dense neighborhoods of Brazil

• Vehicle System: Drive on Indian roads, smash through zombie hordes with drivable vehicles

• Robot Companion: Deploy a cute combat robot ally that automatically hunts and kills zombies by your side

Get Zombie Killer - Overkill Protocol DLC to unlock all of the above.
